Localization.Description: Logging into the system from one host under multiple accounts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Logon under multiple accounts ({subject.application.account.name}) from host {src.host} to 1C system {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
Logon under multiple accounts ({subject.application.account.name}) from host {src.host} to Bitrix24 system {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
